overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a red jacket walking through a dystopian industrial urban environment at dusk. The character navigates under elevated highway structures, passes pedestrians, crosses an intersection, and approaches a waterfront area with towering futuristic buildings and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk beneath elevated transit highway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the rusted elevated highway structure

entered.detail: large rusted metal highway structure with red warning lights spanning overhead
dark industrial building with green neon accents and metal piping
low concrete wall separating sidewalk from the multi-lane road
pink and purple illuminated advertisements visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow industrial sidewalk beneath a massive rusted elevated highway. To the left, dark warehouse buildings with green neon lights line the path, while a concrete barrier separates the walkway from the sparse traffic on the right. Dusk lighting mixes with the red glow of overhead warning lights and distant neon signs.

events.description: passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk
turns left at the intersection to cross the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk then turning left to cross the street at the intersection

notable_agents.action: woman in tank top and jeans walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large cylindrical metal storage tank with pipes and valves
palm trees planted in raised concrete planters along the sidewalk
tall metal pole with traffic signals and street signs

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the sidewalk, passing a pedestrian walking the opposite way. The environment features industrial tanks and palm tree planters. Approaching the intersection, the character turns left to cross the street, moving away from the industrial buildings and toward a more open urban area.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront arterial road with city skyline views

events.description: approaches waterfront railing with view of bay and distant illuminated cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking along the roadside with active traffic passing by, heading toward the waterfront overlook

notable_agents.action: green sports car with glowing accents driving past on the left

entered.detail: tall cylindrical tower with orange and red illuminated sections dominating the skyline
curved concrete highway ramp passing overhead
low concrete barrier with vertical slits overlooking the water
calm water surface reflecting the city lights and overcast sky

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the character walks along a wider road beneath massive concrete overpasses. A distinctive orange-lit skyscraper rises on the left while traffic passes by. The scene opens to a waterfront view with a concrete railing overlooking the bay, revealing the distant illuminated cityscape across the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that gradually opens into a wide, illuminated waterfront vista. It begins with the character walking along a narrow sidewalk beneath a rusted elevated highway, where dark warehouses and green neon lights contrast with the red glow of overhead warning lamps. As the character passes a pedestrian and navigates past industrial tanks and palm tree planters, the camera follows a left turn across a street intersection, shifting away from the dense industrial structures. The scene then expands beneath massive concrete overpasses and past an orange-lit skyscraper before the path opens up to a concrete railing. Finally, the view reveals a sprawling bay and a distant, illuminated cityscape shimmering across the water under the dusk sky.
